title: MGIC Investment Corporation Announces Additional $750 Million Share Repurchase Program and Quarterly Dividend of $0.15 Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: MGIC Investment Corporation announced board approval for an additional $750 million share repurchase program, with authorization to purchase common stock through December 31, 2028. The company also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share payable on May 21, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement of a $750 million share repurchase program combined with a quarterly dividend demonstrates strong capital management and confidence in the company's financial position. These actions typically signal management's belief that the stock is undervalued and indicate shareholder-friendly capital allocation policies.

title: MGIC Investment Corporation Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.15 Per Share
author: Prnewswire
description: MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share, payable on March 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. The mortgage insurance company continues to support affordable homeownership through private mortgage insurance offerings.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement of a consistent quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share demonstrates the company's financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders, which is a positive indicator for investors.

title: MGIC Investment Corporation Announces an Increase to Quarterly Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: MGIC Investment Corporation has increased its quarterly cash dividend by 15% to $0.15 per share, payable on August 21, 2025, to shareholders of record as of August 7, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company increased its quarterly dividend by 15%, which typically signals financial strength and confidence in future earnings, thus indicating a positive outlook for investors

title: MGIC Investment Announces Additional $750 Million Share Repurchase Program and Quarterly Dividend of $0.13 Per Share
